allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"password":"familie123"}' -c /tmp/cookies.txt -w "API Login: HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -o /tmp/login_resp.txt)

Bash(curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/recipes -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Spaghetti Bolognese","ingredients":["Hackfleisch","Tomaten","Spaghetti","Zwiebeln","Knoblauch"],"recipe_text":"Hackfleisch anbraten, Tomaten dazu, kochen."}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}')

Bash(curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/recipes/2 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Spaghetti Bolognese \(überarbeitet\)","ingredients":["Hackfleisch","Tomaten","Spaghetti","Zwiebeln","Knoblauch","Parmesan"],"recipe_text":"Hackfleisch anbraten, Sauce kochen, mit Parmesan servieren."}' -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}')

Bash(curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/recipes/2 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Spaghetti Bolognese","ingredients":["Hackfleisch","Tomaten","Spaghetti"],"recipe_text":"[\\"Hackfleisch anbraten\\",\\"Tomaten dazugeben, 20 Min köcheln\\",\\"Mit Spaghetti servieren\\"]"}' -w ' HTTP %{http_code}')

Bash(zip -r essensplan-upload.zip essensplan-familie --exclude 'essensplan-familie/node_modules/*' --exclude 'essensplan-familie/.next/*' --exclude 'essensplan-familie/.git/*' --exclude essensplan-familie/essensplan.db --exclude essensplan-familie/.env.local --exclude essensplan-familie/.DS_Store --exclude 'essensplan-familie/**/.DS_Store' --exclude 'essensplan-familie/.claude/*' --exclude essensplan-familie/CLAUDE.md --exclude essensplan-familie/AGENTS.md)
